name: James T. Beaumont Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at James T. Beaumont Community Center in La Grange, KY! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
fees: Fee required — $1 donation per day suggested

name: John W Black Community Park
description: John W Black Community Park is a place to play pickleball in La Grange, KY. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: La Grange Community Center
description: La Grange Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in La Grange, KY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Oldham County YMCA
description: Oldham County YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Buckner, KY. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights and restrooms. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Pickle Jar
description: "Get Pickled with fun on our court - the Pickle jar is open"

name: Private Crestwood Backyard Court
description: This is a top of the line private backyard court. 10 layer cushioned SportMaster Pickle master surface. Lights, umbrella covered court side seating, covered patio seating, also space for any kids to be entertained while you play.

name: Spring Hill Clubhouse
description: Spring Hill Clubhouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Crestwood, KY. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Contact Spring Hill HOA

name: Wendel Moore Park
description: Come play pickleball at Wendel Moore Park in Crestwood, KY! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
